title: agrostis alba var. dilatata
intro: Agrostis alba var. dilatata, also known as white bent grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Agrostis alba var. dilatata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
